title: [FIRRTL] Add type lowering support for InstanceChoiceOp
body:
This commit extends the LowerTypes pass to handle InstanceChoiceOp.

The implementation refactors the existing InstanceOp lowering logic into
a generic lowerInstanceLike() function that is shared between
InstanceOp and InstanceChoiceOp.

Additionally, adds getPortDomain() method to FInstanceLike
